title: Lanyard
body: [![Build](https://ci.pyrrha.gay/api/v1/teams/main/pipelines/lanyard/badge)](https://ci.pyrrha.gay/teams/main/pipelines/lanyard) [![Quilt](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-quilt-blueviolet)](https://quiltmc.org) # Lanyard Customizable lanyards for modding events. ## Features * Dyeable lanyards. * Pronouns sync from [PronounDB](https://pronoundb.org). * Customizable name, bio, and pronouns. ## Planned features * Plurality support. * Pride lanyards. * More customization. * Badges & roles.
